title: tam #8535
definition:
1) perfect, complete
    1a) complete, perfect
        1a1) one who lacks nothing in physical strength, beauty, etc
    1b) sound, wholesome
        1b1) an ordinary, quiet sort of person
    1c) complete, morally innocent, having integrity
        1c1) one who is morally and ethically pure
